_comment: OPTIONAL holiday OVERRIDE/SUPPLEMENT for scripts/calendar_rules.py. Market holidays are now COMPUTED automatically for any year by calendar_rules.computed_holidays() (US NYSE/CME + UK LSE: fixed dates, nth-weekday rules, Good Friday/Easter, and weekend-observance) so the calendar never needs annual maintenance. Use this file ONLY to add a one-off / unscheduled closure (e.g. a national day of mourning) the rule-based generator can't know about — keys are calendar groups US/UK, dates YYYY-MM-DD observed. The entries below are the computed 2026-2027 set kept as a redundant cross-check; they may be safely emptied.
